docs.title: Curriculum vitae
docs.text: Martin Dürrmeier, mail [at] martinduerrmeier [dot] com, Berlin - Germany

docs.title: Summary
docs.text: Systems Thinker riding the Elevator from Business to the Engine Room. 20+ years experience in problem-solving as Software Engineer and Architect. Software modernisation, cloud migrations and forming teams.

docs.title: Robert Bosch GmbH
docs.text:
Sep 2020-Present Convenience Charging Solution Architect, DevOps Architect

  • leading architecture modernisation team
  • leading special interest group architecture
  • leading special interest group documentation
  • Responsible for migrating 26 microservices from on premise cloud to AWS EKS

Mar 2019-Sep 2020 Smart Charging Software Engineer

  • Developing backend that calculates optimized charging plan based on Photovoltaic and electricity forecast on Azure Functions
  • Co-Inventor patent DE 10 2021 209 897 A1

Dec 2018-Mar 2019 Range & Routing Software Engineer

Mar 2009-Dec 2018 Connected Charging Solutions Software Engineer

  • Cloud migration from GlassFish On-Premises to Cloud Foundry and Apache Tomcat
  • Database design
  • RESTful APIs

docs.title: Innovations Softwaretechnologie GmbH (now Bosch)
docs.text:
Jan 2008-July 2008 Internship as Software Engineer

  • Developing an Eclipse plugin for Cruisecontrol

docs.title: Swing GmbH (now myneva.swing)
docs.text:
Sep 2000-Aug 2003 Apprenticeship Computer Science Expert

  • Design and implementation of a messaging system within a business software application to enhance user collaboration

docs.title: embedd an excalidraw drawing in markdown
docs.text: grafic inspiered by circle of concern from Stephen Richards Covey

docs.title: how?
docs.text: I'm using Visual Studio Code with Excalidraw Plugin. Name file e.g. circles.excalidraw.png draw with excalidraw directly in Visual Studio Code.
